mapper.insert: insert into candidate_fit_audits ( candidate_fit_audit_id, company_id, employee_id, jd_match_score, competency_score, interview_score, jd_weight, competency_weight, interview_weight, fit_score, fit_level, note, assessed_by, assessed_at, created_at ) values ( #{candidateFitAuditId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jdMatchScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{competencyScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{interviewScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{jdWeight,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{competencyWeight,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{interviewWeight,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{fitScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{fitLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
